title: Scroll down to the end of the board
excerpt:
hello to all 
what is the easiest way to scroll down to the end of the board. ctrl+end works very rarely and only in some cases

posts.author: integreva (Mantas Stasiunas)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello to all
what is the easiest way to scroll down to the end of the board. ctrl+end works very rarely and only in some cases

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @integreva,

Can you use the down navigation arrow to scroll to the bottom of your board or is this particular function not working expectedly for you?

  • Shortcuts and spreadsheet capabilities

posts.author: integreva (Mantas Stasiunas)
posts.cookedHtml: i have thousands of items - so scrolling it always take tame. one solution is to drag down with the mouse

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: We hear you on this Mantas! We will share your feedback with our product team, and hope at some point in the future we can implement a more efficient shortcut
